description: Educational-proxy CSI 300 total-return and CNY 1-year China Government Bond (CGB) history, 2016-2025, plus trailing dividend yield and ATM 30-day implied volatility, used to drive the Phase 14 Task 2 GBM equity calibration (Gate G-03, risk MR-002). EDUCATIONAL PROXY series approximating published CSI / ChinaBond / Wind levels; NOT a credentialled vendor feed. Replace with licensed market-data extracts and re-run sign-off before any regulatory, pricing, or capital-adequacy use.

daily_synthesis.method: Per calendar year, daily log-returns are drawn from a seeded Gaussian with daily vol = target_annual_vol/sqrt(252) and then de-meaned so the compounded calendar-year total return equals the documented annual_equity_returns value exactly. A correlated standard-normal rate shock (Cholesky, target_rate_equity_corr) drives an intra-year random-walk deviation of the 1Y CGB yield around its documented year average, so the realised Pearson correlation between equity log-returns and yield changes recovers target_rate_equity_corr. Fully deterministic given seed.

primary_sources: CSI 300 Index calendar-year total return (educational proxy levels)
ChinaBond 1Y China Government Bond yield, annual average (educational proxy levels)
SSE 50ETF ATM 30-day option implied volatility (educational proxy)
data_lineage.production_restriction: Proxy levels only. Replace with licensed CSI/ChinaBond/Wind extracts and re-run sign-off before regulatory, pricing, or capital-adequacy use.

notes: 10 calendar years of daily synthesis (>= 2500 daily observations; G-03 criterion 1 needs >= 750). Mean annual excess return over the 1Y CGB, less a 0.7% survivorship adjustment, yields an ERP near the middle of the documented CNY range [2.5%, 5.0%].
